note: Skeleton — awaits architect self-declaration. HUMAN.md remains as historical authored space; this profile is where standing/handles/budget/telos live going forward. self_declared is null because comfort_field and description must be self-authored (per hermes precedent and the substrate's voice-equality principle) — Claude refuses to project these for the architect. budget is null because human attention is not measured in tokens; if a budget concept emerges later (e.g. attention-availability windows), it goes here.
